name: Mango Butter
recipeIngredient: 6 cups half-ripe or ripe mangoes, cut fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the mango slices with water until tender.
2. Pass through a sieve or fruit press if the mangoes are stringy.
3. Add sugar and cook until the consistency reaches that of butter.
4. Pour into hot, sterile jars and seal.
5. Process pints at boiling for 10 minutes.
6. Optionally, add spices with the sugar: 1/4 teaspoon each ground cloves and allspice, plus 1/2 teaspoon each ground cinnamon and nutmeg.
